name: Spicy Fruit
short_description: A fruit merging game with a spicy twist!
detailed_description:
Spicy Fruit is a physics-based puzzle game! Drop cute fruit! Combine matching fruit to evolve to the next fruit! Feed them chili peppers to set them ablaze for more points! When you combine 2 chili peppers, things get even crazier! But, be careful not to overfill the container!

Tips

  • Achieve multiple fruit merges from a single drop to increase the combo multiplier!
  • Combine 2 chili peppers to make a super pepper! When a fruit eats a super pepper, it becomes a super fruit!
  • Super fruit eat chili peppers to evolve to the next fruit! And, they eat smaller burning fruit for more points when they explode from a full stomach!

Leaderboard

Have your high score placed on the global leaderboard!
